Elections & Voter Registration
Sarah Geesaman, Director
sgeesaman@perryco.org
Phone
: 717-582-5107
Office Hours
:  to , Monday through Friday
Location:
Freedom Building, 15 W. Main St, New Bloomfield, PA 17068
Mailing Address:
Perry County Voter Registration
P.O. Box# 37
New Bloomfield, PA 17068
The Elections and Voter Registration Office is responsible for registering residents of Perry County to vote, and maintaining accurate voter registration records, according to Pennsylvania law. The responsibilities of this office include necessary preparation for all elections including: ballots, maintaining individual voting records, election supplies, training for elected Election Officials, and supervision of the official count of votes cast. The Perry County Board of Elections certifies the election returns.
PERRY COUNTY BOARD OF ELECTIONS
Brenda L Watson
William Lyons
Franklin Campbell
ClearCast voting machines have no wireless or network transmission capability.
IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE REPORTING REQUIREMENTS OF ACT 88 OF 2022, PERRY COUNTY ISSUED 2,015 MAIL-IN AND ABSENTEE BALLOTS AND RECEIVED A TOTAL OF 1,621 BY 8 PM ON THE DAY OF MAY 19, 2026, GENERAL ELECTION.
